# Add academic provenance, citation and licence metadata for every historical target

Epic: `HIST-001` — Historical source archival and reproducibility

Labels: type:data-source, type:licence, type:publication, risk:licence, status:implemented

Status: `implemented`

## Background

This issue was generated from `conductor/backlog.yml`; the criteria below are the track-specific acceptance contract.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Every target records source URL, archive page, source version, citation key, licence gate and review state.
- [ ] Download evidence does not imply redistribution permission.
